title: HubSpot for Nonprofits
description: HubSpot for Nonprofits provides eligible nonprofit or social-impact organizations with nonprofit discounts, fundraising tools, communications tools, productivity tools under its current published program terms.
eligibility: Organizations must satisfy the provider's current nonprofit-status verification, acceptable-use, product, and regional requirements.
value: Nonprofit pricing and CRM resources for fundraising, outreach, and supporter management.
